sys_remote_update_set.name: ITSM Demo - Core Configuration
sys_remote_update_set.description: Core configuration for ITSM Demo: Script Includes, Business Rules, ACLs, Scheduled Jobs. Part 1 of 3.

sys_script_include.name: ITSMGroupAssignment
sys_script_include.description: Handles assignment of incidents to the appropriate L1/L2/L3 support groups based on the incident category and escalation status.

sys_script_include.name: ITSMNotificationUtils
sys_script_include.description: Utility class for sending notifications related to incident lifecycle events.

sys_script_include.name: ITSMEmailParser
sys_script_include.description: Parses incoming emails to create incidents. Extracts subject, body, category, urgency from email content.

sys_script_include.name: ProblemUtils
sys_script_include.description: Utility class for Problem Management operations. Handles problem creation from incidents, state tracking, and notifications.

sys_script_include.name: ChangeUtils
sys_script_include.description: Utility class for Change Management operations. Handles infrastructure change flow, auto task creation, CAB approval.

sys_script_include.name: KnowledgeUtils
sys_script_include.description: Utility class for Knowledge Management. Manages 2 KBs (Technical requiring approval, Employee auto-publish) with different access controls.

sys_script_include.name: SLAUtils
sys_script_include.description: Utility class for SLA Management. Handles Response/Resolution SLA creation, monitoring, and notification triggering.

sys_script.name: Set L1 Group Assignment
L1 to L2 Escalation
State Change Notification Trigger
Restrict Incident Visibility
Problem State Change Notification
Infrastructure Change Flow
Change State Notification
KB Article Publish Approval
KB Article Auto-Publish
Start SLA on Incident Create
Stop SLA on Incident Resolve/Close

sys_security_acl.name: incident
incident
kb_knowledge.technical.read
kb_knowledge
kb_knowledge.employee.read
kb_knowledge

sysauto_script.name: SLA Check & Notification Processor
